author: lOrm
content: Acknowledged as architectural — not addressable as a single bulk-pass fix. MemoryDb still has 30+ methods spanning 8 subsystems (archival, core, schema migration, sessions, activity, patterns, relationships, errors, preferences, raw SQL). Mandated refactor (extract per-concern repos behind narrow traits, separate schema module, PromptFormatter on read-side traits, Arc<Mutex<Connection>> or r2d2) is a multi-day project. Leaving open as the canonical tracker for the MemoryDb decomposition; small targeted fixes (e.g. extracting individual subsystems) can blame this for direction.
